title: Serve Api
description: Developers and agents need an API-only entry point for a repo without bundling the UI. `specd serve` discovers `specd.yaml`, starts `createApiServer` on loopback, and in v1 accepts only `--auth disabled` so local Studio behavior matches embedded serve.
context: Developers and agents need an API-only entry point for a repo without bundling the UI. `specd serve` discovers `specd.yaml`, starts `createApiServer` on loopback, and in v1 accepts only `--auth disabled` so local Studio behavior matches embedded serve.

rules.requirement: serve command exposes port host config and auth flags
rules: The CLI MUST register `specd serve` with `--port|-p` (default 4400), `--host|-h` (default 127.0.0.1), `--config|-c`, and `--auth`.

rules.requirement: serve auth flag accepts only disabled in v1
rules: When `--auth` is provided, the only accepted value MUST be `disabled`; any other value MUST exit with a non-zero status and an explanatory message.

rules.requirement: serve discovers project and starts default auth registry
rules: The command MUST discover `specd.yaml`, build `createApiServer` with `defaultAuthAdapterRegistry()`, and listen until SIGINT.

scenarios.requirement: serve command exposes port host config and auth flags
scenarios.name: specd serve accepts port and host flags
then: AND project is discovered from cwd

scenarios.name: Default port is 4400 on loopback
